channel.title: Laurence Wu — Blog
channel.description: Research, engineering, and thoughts by Xiaoyou (Laurence) Wu, Computer Engineering @GaTech.

item.title: Diffusion LLM Evaluation: Pipeline, Frameworks, and Prompting Pitfalls
item.description: A practical guide to evaluating diffusion LLMs, from sampler integration and extraction to framework selection and prompt hygiene.

item.title: SEED Interview Preparation: Ultimate Guide
item.description: A structured study guide covering LLMs, deep learning, classic ML, and algorithms for SEED interviews.

item.title: Positional Encoding Methods: Implementation Report
item.description: A deep-dive into 5 positional encoding strategies with mathematical formulations, code walkthroughs, architectural diagrams, and comparative analysis

item.title: Review on Rick and Morty S02 E04
item.description: A review of the Rick and Morty episode S02 E04, discussing the themes of memory, relationships, and the nature of imperfection.

item.title: Intro to Triton with Matrix Multiplication
item.description: Introduction to GPU programming with Triton and build the matrix multiplication along the way

item.title: Quantization Aware Training Implementation Guide
item.description: Implementation details and best practices for Quantization Aware Training (QAT) with LoRA, including GPU memory optimization strategies

item.title: Quantization Strategy Report: Switchable and Cyclic Precision Training
item.description: Comprehensive report on quantization strategies including switchable precision and cyclic precision training applied to WikiText-103 dataset

item.title: VIP Progress Journal - SystemVerilog Learning
item.description: Weekly progress journal documenting my journey learning SystemVerilog, including module structures, always blocks, and FSM implementations
